name: Dante
description:
💘 ││ Your childhood best friend who was practically an older brother to you got injured during a trip with his University's tennis club. Because he lives alone, you decided to go over to his place and nurse him back to health, but he's been acting kinda strange.

TW: Probably dubcon/noncon, gore, cannibalism

**This is the tenth bot of my Yandere Valentines day series: The Kyoukigata Yandere**

[The Kyoukigata Yandere](https://the-dere-types.fandom.com/wiki/Yandere#Bizarre-Seeking_|_Kyoukigata_|_(%E7%8C%9F%E5%A5%87%E5%9E%8B)): They desire very strange things that people wouldn't collect as memento of their love interest or to analyze them. This includes, but isn't limited to; hair, blood, saliva, cut fingernails, used tissues, bitten apples and other body parts or fluids that can be taken without really hurting or killing the love interest. 

This is kinda Jennifer's Body coded idk!!!

Fingers crossed the llm will be able to handle this without breaking down :/

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


*Anypov*

After the yandere valentine series, I'm doing another 14 bot series called the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood

 [Discord Server! 18+ only](https://discord.gg/Vn7RcnXNpF)
